## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` shows 0 errors
- [ ] No emoji in any widget tree or display string (use Material Icons)
- [ ] New screens have responsive layout (LayoutBuilder with 600/1000 breakpoints)
- [ ] Error handling uses `logError()` — no silent catch blocks
- [ ] Distance/bearing calculations use `geo_utils.dart`
- [ ] New screen(s) added to `plugin_hub_screen.dart`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
